name: Flame Tongue Longsword
entries: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this weapon.

Flames. As a Bonus Action, you can cause flames to engulf the blade or extinguish them. While the blade is ablaze, it deals an extra 2d6 Fire damage on a hit and sheds Bright Light in a 40-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 40 feet.
